docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY NASALGA, MARK AS TO DEFENDANT LYFT, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-02-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE CT CORPORATION SYSTEM) FILED BY PLAINTIFF NASALGA, MARK AS TO DEFENDANT LYFT, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT LYFT, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) JEANNIE LIEU, PARALEGAL FILED BY DEFENDANT LYFT, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-06-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-06-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF MARK NASALGA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LYFT, INC., REPRESENTED BY JEANNIE LIEU (PARALEGAL) IS PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NASALGA, MARK IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LYFT, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE FROM THE DEFENDANT. PARTIES WILL EXCHANGE CONTACT INFORMATION.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-06-2022 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NO SIGNATURE**SEE SIGNATURE/RECD BY LINE** SERVED JUN-24-2022, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LYFT, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-02-2022 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO SEP-06-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MARK NASALGA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LYFT, INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JENNIE LIEU, PARALEGAL. DEFENDANT WILL RESEARCH PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM INFORMATION. PARTIES ARE TO EXCHANGE CONTACT INFORMAITON. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
